description: End-to-end gate for the Town of East Fremantle per the per-council recipe.

recorded.method: verify_beeliar.py --address '87 PETRA STREET EAST FREMANTLE' --other-council 'City of Cockburn'. Full run: reports/east_fremantle_canary_run.json.
recorded.decode_library: 697 approved scoped rules from 13 instruments (LPS3 scheme text, 9 LPPs incl. 3.1.1 Residential Design Guidelines, strategy, 2 precinct plans). Pipeline: gpt-4o-mini decode (1,212) -> gpt-4o correct (705 kept / 507 rejected) -> noise sweep (8) -> scope.

faithfulness_audit.note: 3 majority flags: 1 real (vague quote fragment overstated, corrected in place); 2 overturned on operator review (claims restate their quotes verbatim; judge reasons were self-contradicting).
